title: The Occult
description: A mod introducing demons, rituals and dark magic.
body:
**Alpha, expect many bugs**

The occult adds cult/dark magic related things to the base game.

---

To get started, You should find an **occult structure**. These are usually large, looming structures with a parkour course which you have to complete in order to get its loot. The loot in them can be very useful, such as **Bewitchment Orbs.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68bc26c75c3a16b80414a35f2ed840b93aea86c0.png)!



Bewitchment orbs can only be found inside of these structures, they are used to bewitch items such as Sacrificial daggers, or the gloomy hood. Bewitched items have special abilities, and sometimes a curse. 

They can be found in 4 states.

![4 types of bewitchment orbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ee8609fb6391683633d4779bcc0b585f7301709.png)
### Small, basic, fate, and soul.

- **Small orbs** give a tiny boost that doesn't really do that much difference.
- **Basic orbs** give a somewhat good ability that can be powerful if used well.
- **Fate orbs** have a really useful ability, however they have a bound curse that comes with them, meaning if you have it on a tool, then while that tool is in your inventory, then you also get a curse.
- **Soul orbs** aren't for items. but for players. They take up your inventory space in return for an ability while they're in your inventory, they can be crafted by using a part of a mob, and soul bewitchment orb fragments.



Bewitched items change their apperance:

![Normal and bewitched items with fate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98f1fd667e526bb2b0da691c188823199d5f2167.png)

Occult also offers many new decorative blocks.

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b925f6aac068b90c774eb7f420d596fb26be96.png)


## However, every good mod has to have a threat..

![Tendrils coming out of the bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b5c376976b07fe1c1a777ca038dcad1f41d01b.png)

The bedbug is a brand new mob that appears when you try to sleep in an unlit bed, they are characterized by tentacles which form under beds if they're not in enough light.

![The Bedbug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8924233dc0136443cc46d220af87916f83f99abe_0.webp)

The bedbug itself isn't a threat, however what it does, is. The bed bug has an ability called bug vibration, which works like the warden, however instead of it getting attracted to mobs, mobs get attracted to it. So all mobs will come towards the bedbug if not killed fast enough. The bedbug is unpredictable and will attract hordes of mobs near you

![Ditto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb77b40eca8b4767068bf385d29ce46dee273fbb_0.webp)


There's also many other beings, however I'll leave that to you to find out :)
